title: glaucium vitellinum
intro: Glaucium vitellinum, also known as the yellow horned poppy, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its alkaloids, which exhibit analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Glaucium vitellinum include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and potentially even anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as extracts and tinctures, are sometimes used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
